launch_inputs.contract_source: Extract the customer-obligation terms from the uploaded audit export assistance agreement excerpt, especially SLA windows, evidence retention, support obligations, exclusions, and approval requirements.
launch_inputs.target_terms: response deadlines, audit-support obligations, evidence retention, customer escalation triggers, service exclusions, approval gates
launch_inputs.normalization_rules: Return short normalized field names with clause evidence and ambiguity notes when the contract language is conditional or split across multiple sections.
